requests.title: Recover my research data from the Hope's wreck site
requests.body: My medical research was backed up to a relay buoy we passed on the way out. If it's still there, I want it. Some of what I was studying might matter more than I realized at the time.

requests.title: Track the beacon Markov planted on the Eclipse ship
requests.body: That subspace beacon I planted is still transmitting. Whoever bought that targeting tech off the Eclipse is out there, and I'm curious where the signal leads.

requests.title: Settle a debt on Omega before we left
requests.body: There's someone on Omega I owe money to. The kind you don't want following the ship. Handle it before we're out of range and I'll fly anything you point me at.

requests.title: Smuggle a case of "premium stock" aboard, no questions
requests.body: I know a guy. He's got a case of the good stuff that fell off a transport. Just need a little cargo space and for nobody to look too closely. For the crew's morale, obviously.
